svg.title: YAPNE C4 component diagram and grouped dependency graph
svg.desc: A C4-style component diagram and grouped dependency graph for the YAPNE browser-based Petri net editor application.
svg.text: C4 component view plus grouped JavaScript dependency graph for Yet Another Petri Net Editor.
Shows the browser application as the container and its major runtime components, integrations, browser services, and generated assets.
Single-page Vite application using ES modules, Canvas, DOM panels, local browser storage, and static public assets.
Loads modules and wires sidebar UI.
Static imports and active script tags collapsed into package-like groups. Dashed edges mark browser globals, generated bundles, or asset loading.

Boxes list representative files. Blue rows are active entry/runtime modules. Amber rows are source-only or generated/support modules. Edge labels name the dominant dependency, not every individual import.
Creates app singleton, captures undo snapshots,
and coordinates editor state with DOM controls.
and exports traces as CSV, JSON, or XES.
PNML export is lossy for final markings.
static import or direct module dependency
runtime global, browser API, or asset load
